output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.user_id) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Premium Support';

Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)

Question: Get the top 15 countries by top line.
output: SELECT u.country, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 15;
